headline: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Is Up 10.8% After Deepening Industrial 5G And AI Factory Security Push
summary: In early March 2026, Siemens announced a verified cybersecurity solution for industrial private 5G networks built on its own 5G infrastructure and Palo Alto Networks’ AI‑optimized next‑generation firewall, tested to meet IEC 62443 standards without sacrificing low‑latency, high‑throughput performance for AI‑driven production. Around the same time, Palo Alto Networks expanded its security ecosystem through collaborations with Nokia, U Mobile, Aeris, and Celerway to secure AI factories,...

summary: Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (NASDAQ:PANW) is one of the cheap AI stocks to buy in 2026.
